scores.correctness_notes: All three required sections (services, checks, log-targets) are present and correctly structured. on-check-failure links the check name to restart action. Check has correct fields. Log target has correct type/location/services/labels fields.
scores.hallucination_notes: on-success and on-failure are not valid Pebble service fields — the valid fields are on-check-failure, on-success, on-failure do not exist in Pebble layer spec. Also 'loki-labels' mentioned as a supported type in the explanation is not in the gold standard (gold says loki/opentelemetry/syslog). Minor inaccuracies in the explanatory text.
